response.global_analysis: The video features the conclusion of a 3D LIVE concert by FUWAMOCO. The song performed is an original track titled 'Wishful☆Garnet' (identified from on-screen text at the beginning, contradicting the 'Wacha Wacha' title in the reference JSON). Lyrics for the original song were transcribed directly from the burnt-in on-screen text, ensuring 100% accuracy in wording. Timing for the lyrics and the spoken English outro was strictly synchronized with the vocal audio. The final visual text on the ending graphic was also transcribed and translated to provide full context for the event's conclusion.

subtitles.english: So that you can look forward,

subtitles.original: わたしが壊してあげる
subtitles.english: I will break them for you.

subtitles.original: もう負けないで進むこと
subtitles.english: To keep moving forward without losing anymore.

subtitles.original: わたしはいつもいるから
subtitles.english: Because I'll always be with you.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: at our encore live in membership, okay?
subtitles.english: at our encore live in membership, okay?

subtitles.original: メン限アンコールライブで待ってるよー！
subtitles.english: See you at our encore live in membership!
